title: cenostigma pluviosum var. sanfranciscanum
intro: Cenostigma pluviosum var. sanfranciscanum, also known as San Francisco cinchona, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic effects. The health benefits associated with Cenostigma pluviosum var. sanfranciscanum include the treatment of fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
